name: harness
description: Agent Team & Skill Architect plugin for Claude Code. Generates production-ready agent teams and skills for any domain.

plugins.name: harness
plugins.description: A meta-skill that designs domain-specific agent teams, defines specialized agents, and generates the skills they use. Supports 6 architectural patterns: Pipeline, Fan-out/Fan-in, Expert Pool, Producer-Reviewer, Supervisor, and Hierarchical Delegation.
